{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Soulforge platform
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] has a platform.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
